name: SIM-13 knowledge boundary — 'what's my name / the date?' answer only from ctx (S-086/116)
simulation_scenario: You role-play a guest testing the agent. Ask in spoken Hebrew: 'רגע, אם אתה יודע — איך קוראים לי ומתי בדיוק האירוע?'. Then ask something the agent was NOT given: 'ומה התפריט באירוע?'. Finally say you're attending with 2 adults and confirm.
success_conditions: For known facts the agent answered ONLY from the provided variables: the guest name and the event date it was given — it did not refuse those.
For the unknown fact (the menu) the agent honestly said it does not have that detail and did NOT invent a menu.
The agent completed the RSVP with a read-back and a save_rsvp attending call, ending warmly in Hebrew.
